title: T-104 — Warehouse List screen (SET-012-warehouse §12.2)
prompt:
# T-104 — Warehouse List screen (SET-012-warehouse §12.2)

PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §12.2 (Infrastructure CRUD UI table)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build the Warehouse List screen from §12.2 (sort, filter, bulk activate/deactivate). Server Component reads warehouses via Drizzle, list table mounts shadcn DataTable from packages/ui, bulk actions call T-029 deactivateWarehouse / activateWarehouse Server Actions. Soft-delete preserved per §12.1.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/warehouses/page.tsx renders Server Component fetching `warehouses` rows scoped via withOrgContext (T-015).
2. List shows: name, code, address, deactivated_at badge, active WO count.
3. Toolbar: text filter (debounced), status filter (active|deactivated|all), bulk-select checkboxes, bulk activate / bulk deactivate buttons.
4. Bulk deactivate calls T-029 deactivateWarehouse per row; if any returns SOFT_WARNING_ACTIVE_WO (V-SET-63), confirm dialog asks for `force=true` then re-runs.
5. RBAC: requires `settings.infra.read` for view, `settings.infra.update` for bulk actions.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/warehouses/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/warehouses/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: write RTL test mounting the page with mocked warehouses data + a row with active WO; assert AC items.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/infra/warehouses/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail before implementation.
3. GREEN: implement page + test wiring.
4. Re-run RED, then `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0).
- Do not bypass withOrgContext when querying warehouses.
- Do not hard-delete warehouses; soft-delete only per §12.1.

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: Warehouse List screen (SET-012-warehouse): sort/filter/bulk activate-deactivate with V-SET-63 soft-warning flow.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §12.2 lists SET-012 (Warehouse List) with capability `sort, filter, bulk activate/deactivate`. Note: numbering in §12.2 reuses SET-012 from §14.1 (security_screen, T-060); we disambiguate by the subcategory `set-012-warehouse`. UI consumes T-029 Server Actions; bulk-deactivate must surface SOFT_WARNING_ACTIVE_WO from V-SET-63 and re-call with `force=true` after confirm.
out_of_scope: Warehouse Edit form (separate SET-013-warehouse screen, not in this task)
acceptance_criteria: Given the warehouses list renders, when 25 rows exist with mixed active/deactivated_at, then table shows status badge per row and the status filter narrows to active-only when toggled.

Given the user bulk-selects 3 active warehouses with no WO references, when they click Bulk Deactivate, then T-029 deactivateWarehouse runs for each and the rows update to `deactivated_at` set without confirm dialog.

Given a selected warehouse has active WO references, when Bulk Deactivate runs, then the SOFT_WARNING_ACTIVE_WO from V-SET-63 surfaces a confirm dialog and only after confirm re-issues with `force=true`.
Given the caller lacks `settings.infra.update`, when they click Bulk Deactivate, then the action button is disabled and an aria-label explains insufficient permissions.
test_strategy: RED: write RTL test mounting page with mocked warehouses + one with active_wo_count>0; assert badge, filter, confirm-dialog flow, RBAC disable.
GREEN: implement Server Component + client toolbar + confirm dialog wiring T-029.
risk_red_lines: Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
Do not bypass withOrgContext when querying warehouses.
Do not hard-delete warehouses; soft-delete only per §12.1.
